de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionElement

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S>, IExecutionBlockContract, IExecutionBlockStartNode<S>, IExecutionBranchCondition, IExecutionBranchStatement, IExecutionConstraint, IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn, IExecutionLoopCondition, IExecutionLoopInvariant, IExecutionLoopStatement, IExecutionMethodCall, IExecutionMethodReturn, IExecutionMethodReturnValue, IExecutionNode<S>, IExecutionOperationContract, IExecutionStart, IExecutionStatement, IExecutionTermination, IExecutionValue, IExecutionVariable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode, AbstractExecutionElement, AbstractExecutionMethodReturn, AbstractExecutionNode, AbstractExecutionValue, AbstractExecutionVariable, ExecutionAllArrayIndicesVariable, ExecutionBlockContract, ExecutionBranchCondition, ExecutionBranchStatement, ExecutionConstraint, ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionLoopCondition, ExecutionLoopInvariant, ExecutionLoopStatement, ExecutionMethodCall, ExecutionMethodReturn, ExecutionMethodReturnValue, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessConstraint, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopInvariant, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessOperationContract, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStart, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessTermination, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessValue, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable, ExecutionOperationContract, ExecutionStart, ExecutionStatement, ExecutionTermination, ExecutionValue, ExecutionVariable, ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionValue, ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable, ExecutionVariableExtractor.StateExecutionVariable

    public interface IExecutionElement
    Defines the basic methods and properties each element in the symbolic execution tree model has.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      RuleApp getAppliedRuleApp()
      Returns the applied RuleApp.
      String getElementType()
      Returns a human readable element type name.
      InitConfig getInitConfig()
      Returns the InitConfig used by getProof().
      PosInOccurrence getModalityPIO()
      Returns the PosInOccurrence of the modality of interest including updates.
      String getName()
      Returns a human readable name which describes this element.
      Proof getProof()
      Returns the Proof from which the symbolic execution tree was extracted.
      Node getProofNode()
      Returns the Node in KeY's proof tree which is represented by this execution tree node.
      NodeInfo getProofNodeInfo()
      Returns the NodeInfo of getProofNode().
      Services getServices()
      Returns the Services used by getProof().
      ITreeSettings getSettings()
      Returns the ITreeSettings to use.
      boolean isDisposed()
      Checks if the proof is disposed.

               throws ProofInputException
        Returns a human readable name which describes this element.

      • getElementType

        String getElementType()
        Returns a human readable element type name.
        Returns:
        The human readable element type.

      • isDisposed

        boolean isDisposed()
        Checks if the proof is disposed.
        Returns:
        true proof is disposed, false proof is not disposed and still valid.
